prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your online business launch forward
items: Research and identify your target market by defining a specific customer persona with demographics, pain points, and buying behaviors
Conduct a competitive analysis by identifying and analyzing 5 direct competitors in your niche
Validate your business idea by conducting 10 customer interviews with people in your target market
Choose and register your business name and secure matching domain name and social media handles
Create a detailed business model canvas outlining your value proposition, revenue streams, and key partnerships
Define your minimum viable product (MVP) by listing the core features needed to solve your customer\
